title: 21:32 â September 15, 2021
body_text:
21:32 â September 15, 2021
Decommission of CAFT
We completed the migration of all Originators from Customer Automated Funds Transfer (CAFT) to
PaymentStream
AFT and removed CAFT-related information from the Payment Solutions Manual and the document library. We also added clarity to the two forms for AFT service via FTP to indicate that this service applies to BC and the Atlantic region, not just BC.
AFT Volume
CAFT Procedures (Ontario) Part
Is obsolete and has been removed from the Manual.
Originating AFT via CAFT (BC) Part
Is obsolete and has been removed from the Manual.
